message:
refactor(codegen): Remove more redundant hoisted_vars checks

Simplify two more patterns in try_except.zig where hoisted_vars.contains()
was checked after isDeclared(), which already checks hoisted_vars.

hoisted_vars.contains() count: 10 -> 8
(4 are pyvalue_hoisted_vars, 2 are implementations, 2 are complex patterns)
